  • 5: Gualtherus reads ΚΑΜΟΛΙΣΣΟΣ
  • 7: Gualtherus reads ΣΥ...ΡΙΩ

English translation

Matthew Hewitt

To the gods of the Underworld. Pomponia Maxima lived 40 years. Klaudios Melissos (made this) for his life partner.
